violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Some dust at cabinet edges behind register. -Residue at handles and door edges of white upright freezers. -Left upright freezer has frost build up at shelves. -Deli display cooler has ice block at interior upper left corner with heavy dust at condenser.
Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — ---Grease/residue at fixtures and drains of 3 compartment sink. -Drain plugs are not well fitted-water does not hold well in basin.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Heavy dust/debris at ceiling vents near fryer. -Dust build up at walk in cooler fans.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
